creator: dmitry.wagin@ya.ru
text:
Сhanged behavior.

man 5 crontab
If MAILTO is defined but empty (MAILTO=""), no mail will be sent.


I had an old MAILTO="" in crontab, after update logs are filled with such messages:
Nov 13 14:11:00 bsd1 cron[11723]: (operator) MAIL (mailed 1 byte of output but got status 0xffffffff )
...

Changing setting MAILTO="" -> MAILTO= removes the messages.
